SEARCH
Package com.icarus.events

Class NotificationHelper

java.lang.Object
com.icarus.events.NotificationHelper
public class NotificationHelper extends Object
Helper class for managing Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) operations.

Provides static utility methods to retrieve the current device's FCM registration token and to send push notifications directly from the application using a Google Service Account for OAuth2 authentication.

  • Nested Class Summary

    static interface 
    NotificationHelper.OnTokenReceivedListener
    Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when an FCM token is received.

      public NotificationHelper()

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentToken

      public static void getCurrentToken(NotificationHelper.OnTokenReceivedListener listener)
      Retrieves the current FCM registration token for the device asynchronously.

      Uses the FirebaseMessaging service to fetch the unique token that identifies this app instance on the Google servers. Results are returned via the provided listener.

      Parameters:
      listener - the callback listener to handle the retrieved token or errors

    • sendPush

      public static void sendPush(android.content.Context context, String targetToken, String eventName, String body)
      Sends a push notification to a specific target device using the FCM HTTP v1 API.

      This method runs on a background thread to perform network operations. It loads service account credentials from the local assets, generates an OAuth2 access token, and dispatches a POST request to the Firebase messaging endpoint.

      Parameters:
      context - the context used to access assets and initialize the Volley request queue
      targetToken - the FCM registration token of the recipient device
      eventName - the title of the notification (typically the name of the associated event)
      body - the message content to be displayed in the notification
